---
title: "Variation in Many-Analyst Projects: Harmful or Helpful?"
format:
  revealjs:
    theme: uu.scss
    logo: UU_logo_2021_EN_RGB.png
output: pdf
bibliography: ref_10-05-26.bib
author: 
- name: Loesje Ubbink
  orcid: 0009-0009-3718-8952
  affiliations:
      - name: Methodology & Statistics, Utrecht University
- name: Suzanne Hoogeveen
  orcid: 0000-0002-1304-8615
  affiliations:
      - name: Methodology & Statistics, Utrecht University
---

## Reproducibility Crisis

- Questionable research practices
- Many-analyst projects: same data, same question, \
**different** results

\

- Methodological noise or substantively meaningful differences?


## Sources of Variation

- Many-analyst projects **describe** but **do not quantify**

## Present Study


## Methods


## Results


## Discussion
